audit_items.proof_trace: The implementation returns 0 sidecars when blobs is empty (L165-167) instead of NUMBER_OF_COLUMNS empty sidecars. However, this is intentional and explicitly tested (kzg_utils.rs::test_build_data_columns_empty::L468). When no blobs exist, no data distribution is needed, making empty-vector return semantically correct and more efficient than 128 empty structures.
